name: Nonsense
overview: Mamun’s lies spiral out of control, complicating his life at home and work. Meanwhile, aspiring politician Mr. Sarafat is overwhelmed by his own deceptions. Their lives collide through unexpected circumstances.

trailers.title: Nonsense (ননসেন্স) | Trailer | WEB Series | Intekhab, Tony, Aisha Khan, Mamo | Bangla New Natok 2025
